title: Installing solar panels not valid industrial use of allotted land: Madras High Court
description: The Madras High Court has held that installing solar panels on an industrial plot does not amount to using the land for "industrial purpose" for which it was allotted [Kems Vs SIPCOT].A Division Bench of Justices SM Subramaniam and K Surender made the observation while upholding the decision of State Industries Promotion Corporation of Tamil Nadu (SIPCOT) to reacquire land allotted to a company.The Court was hearing an appeal filed by the company, Kems Forging Ltd., against a single-judge order
